title: Bug Zapper, 4200V Insect Pest Fly Killer, Electric Mosquito Zapper for Indoor and Outdoor 18W, Waterproof Mosquito Killer for Flying Insect Control Lamp, Outdoor & Indoor Mosquito Killer Lamp
bullet_points: ⚡⚡【High Efficient Mosquito Control】18W high-intensity The Electric Killer Lamp Bug Zapper uses an ultraviolet light bulb with a wavelength of 360 NM to effectively attract mosquitoes using human bionic technology and kill them with a high voltage of 4200 V. The energy-saving and powerful UV lamp has a life expectancy of 8500 hours. Our equipment is very effective against mosquitoes, flies, moths and other flying insects.

⚡⚡【Large Area Coverage】Bug zapper 360°UV Mosquito Killer Lamp can be effective for a large area of up to 150m2, With a hook on top, insect lamp can hang anywhere or simply hold upright on the table, just set up the mosquito trap in the desired place.

⚡⚡【Passed IPX4 waterproof level test】Mosquito Killer Lamp There is no problem for you to use in the rain, totally anti-splash. Hang the bug zapper anywhere with AC power with the convenient ring or use the sturdy base to stand on a flat surface to reduce restrictions of bug zapper indoor and outdoor use, keep mosquitoes away from you anywhere. Ideal for bedroom, living room, toilet, kitchen, hotel, patios, balcony, garage, deck. Cable length 1.8m.

⚡⚡【More effective】Bug zapper Top coverage 80 m3 with powerful 4200v high-voltage grid, 3-4 times higher power than alternative insect killers, it provided reliable and effective indoor/outdoor bug control with 360-degree UV release of the fly zapper. Completely silent, turning it on three hours before bedtime will let you sleep like a baby without annoying bug calls and mosquito bites.

⚡⚡Easy upkeep Mosquito Zapper: The mosquito-killing lamp has a removable tray, dead insects collect at the bottom of the unit, which can be easily removed for quick, safe, and easy cleaning.Replaceable U/V light. The mosquito lamp has a housing made of flame retardant ABS material, safe and high temperature resistant. if you have any questions after receiving the goods, please feel free to contact us by email.
